title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 9. LOUISIANA HEALTH EMERGENCY POWERS ACT

§760.  Short title

This Chapter shall be cited as the "Louisiana Health Emergency Powers Act".

Acts 2003, No. 1206, §1.
